summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of enhanced PlastiLu bio link page - all new features implemented perfectly

Animated lines appear only near the title with smooth moving shimmer effect
Main title has luxury gradient style (blue + white) with Playfair Display font correctly applied
Secondary title 'De Goiânia para todas as regiões do Brasil' also has luxury gradient style

Instagram link updated correctly to: https://www.instagram.com/plastilu.embalagens?igsh=MXdreGI0eGR0bHN1
All button hover effects work properly with smooth animations
Responsive design works perfectly on mobile viewport (480px)

WhatsApp button links correctly to phone number 62985230431
Maps button links correctly to Google Maps location
Catalog button links correctly to Google Drive document
Website button links correctly to plastiluembalagens.com.br
Representative button links correctly to WhatsApp with recruitment message
Google Review button links correctly to review sharing URL
Floating animation works smoothly for banner image
No console errors found during testing

Enhanced blue gradient theme with proper contrast and readability
All required page sections present and functional
